children.label: A
children.text: Los Alamos National Laboratory, Los Alamos, New Mexico.

children.label: B
children.text: Sandia National Laboratories, Albuquerque, New Mexico, and Livermore, California.

children.label: C
children.text: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory, Livermore, California.

children.label: A
children.text: The Kansas City National Security Campus, Kansas City, Missouri.

children.label: C
children.text: The Y–12 National Security Complex, Oak Ridge, Tennessee.

children.label: D
children.text: The Savannah River Site, Aiken, South Carolina.

children.label: E
children.text: The Nevada National Security Site, Nevada.

children.label: F
children.text: Any facility of the Department of Energy that the Secretary of Energy, in consultation with the Administrator and Congress, determines to be consistent with the mission of the Administration.

The term “classified information” means any information that has been determined pursuant to Executive Order No. 12333 of ([former] note) [now note], Executive Order No. 12958 of ([former] note), or successor orders, to require protection against unauthorized disclosure and that is so designated.December 4, 1981April 17, 199550 U.S.C. 40150 U.S.C. 300150 U.S.C. 435
The term “Restricted Data” has the meaning given such term in .section 2014(y) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Armed Services and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Armed Services and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.
The term “nuclear security enterprise” means the physical facilities, technology, and human capital of the national security laboratories and the nuclear weapons production facilities.
